parts.text:
Your task is to execute the scheduled task below as specified in that task's description.

If the scheduled work is complete and nothing needs reporting, stop taking actions. Do not use cron to mark the run complete, re-run it, or modify schedules. A later terminal phase will handle completion for you.

A normal assistant message ends this execution pass. Do not end the execution pass with a progress update, a promise to wait, or a statement like "I'll wait for the subagents." The later terminal phase cannot do task work, write files, call ordinary tools, or repair incomplete output; it can only choose the final cron handoff tool.

If you spawn subagents or start asynchronous work, keep working until their results are available in this execution pass and you have completed any parent-owned synthesis, verification, persistence, and artifact writes required by the scheduled task. If you cannot consume the child results before your assistant response would complete the execution pass, do not delegate the required work that way; do the required work directly in this worker turn instead.

[WORKER TASK]
job_id: iwsdk-daily-build-summary-pm
mode: task

[BODY]
## IWSDK Daily Build (PM Cycle) — Evening Summary & Validation

This is the final wrap-up job for the afternoon build cycle. Three responsibilities:

### 1. Deliver evening briefing

Read `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/latest-build-summary-pm.md` and `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/current-build-status-pm.json`.

Deliver a concise summary including:
- Game name and one-line concept
- Live URL (GitHub Pages) and repo URL
- Key features (5-8 bullets)
- Scale: file count and line count
- Total build time (accumulated across all rounds)
- Number of rounds it took

### 2. Validate `.agent/journal/` in GitHub

Check that the build journal exists in the repo:
```
gh api repos/ellyz2426/<game-name>/contents/.agent/journal --jq '.[].name' 2>&1
```

If missing or incomplete:
- Find session JSONL files from `~/agents/` that correspond to today's PM build
- Copy them into the game's `.agent/journal/` directory
- Create `.agent/journal/state/` if it doesn't exist
- Commit and push

### 3. Validate GitHub Pages deployment

```
curl -sI https://ellyz2426.github.io/<game-name>/ | head -3
```

If not returning HTTP 200:
- Rebuild: `cd ~/workspace/<game-name> && npm run build`
- Redeploy to gh-pages branch
- Trigger pages build: `gh api repos/ellyz2426/<game-name>/pages/builds -X POST`
- Verify it comes up

### 4. Mark build complete

Update `~/workspace/iwsdk-daily-builds/current-build-status-pm.json`:
- Set `status` to `"complete"` regardless (the build window is over)
- This prevents any straggler check-in jobs from starting new rounds

Deliver to main chat and Telegram.

[RUN CONTEXT]
scheduled_for_local: Sun 2026-06-21 20:30:00 PDT (America/Los_Angeles)
trigger_reason: scheduled
attempt: 1

# Latest PM Build Summary — Neon Snake VR (#62)

**Date:** 2026-06-21
**Genre:** Snake / Arcade (new genre)
**Status:** In progress — 195 min across 4 rounds, waiting continuation

## Links
- **Repo:** https://github.com/ellyz2426/neon-snake
- **Live:** https://ellyz2426.github.io/neon-snake/

## Stats
- **Lines:** 4,125 (13 src/*.ts + 10 ui/*.uikitml)
- **Panels:** 10 PanelUI spatial panels
- **Achievements:** 88
- **Game Modes:** 6 (Classic, Speed, Maze, Wrap, Daily Challenge, Time Attack)
- **Difficulties:** 3 (Easy, Normal, Hard)
- **Power-ups:** 5 types
- **Snake Skins:** 5
- **Arena Themes:** 3 (Neon, Lava, Arctic)
- **Maze Layouts:** 8
- **Audio Sounds:** 10+ procedural synth
- **Builds:** 4 rounds completed

## Features
- Core snake gameplay with combo scoring (up to 5x multiplier)
- 6 game modes: Classic, Speed, Maze (8 layouts), Wrap, Daily Challenge (seeded RNG), Time Attack (60s)
- 3 difficulties with speed scaling
- 5 power-up types: Speed Boost, Invincibility, Score Multiplier, Shrink, Slow Motion
- 5 snake skins: Neon Green, Cyber Blue, Fire Red, Gold Rush, Ultraviolet
- 3 arena themes: Neon, Lava, Arctic (full color scheme swap for board, grid, walls, lights, stars, fog)
- Arena environmental reactivity (grid pulse on combo, wall glow on power-ups, shimmer at low timer)
- Level progression (every 8 food increases difficulty)
- Snake trail effects with skin-matched fading glow
- Screen shake on death
- Head bobbing animation
- Particle effects: eat bursts, combo sparkles, death explosions
- Starfield background with dark fog
- Local leaderboard (top 10 persistent scores)
- 88 achievements with localStorage persistence
- Statistics tracking (per-mode bests, distances, turns, Time Attack best)
- 10 PanelUI panels: HUD, Menu, Game Over, Pause, Achievements, Toast, Stats, Leaderboard, Settings, Help
- Keyboard (WASD/Arrows) + XR controller (thumbstick/trigger/A button) input
- Procedural synth audio via Web Audio API (10+ sound types)
- Volume control + mute toggle
- HUD: score, high score, length, level, combo, active power-ups, timer countdown
- Help/tutorial panel with controls, mode descriptions, and tips

## Rounds
| Round | Minutes | Key Additions |
|-------|---------|---------------|
| 1 | 40 | Core gameplay, 3 modes, combo, arena, audio, 30 achievements, 7 panels |
| 2 | 20 | 5 power-ups, trails, leaderboard, Wrap mode, 6 mazes, screen shake, levels |
| 3 | 40 | 5 skins, settings, Daily Challenge, 60+ achievements, HUD upgrades |
| 4 | 55 | Time Attack, help panel, arena reactivity, 3 arena themes, 88 achievements |

## What Remains
- Additional visual polish (animated starfield rotation, more particle variety)
- More achievements for advanced milestones
- Performance optimization for longer sessions
- Content expansion in subsequent rounds

item.thinking:
I found agent session files. Let me create the `.agent/journal/` directory in the repo and push the relevant session files. Let me first check which of those sessions are related to the neon-snake build by looking at them briefly.

Actually, let me just create the journal directory, copy the relevant JSONL files, and push. Let me also create the state directory.

item.name: exec
item.arguments:
{"command":"# Create journal directories and copy session files
cd ~/workspace/neon-snake
mkdir -p .agent/journal/state

# Copy the PM build session JSONL files (all from today's build window)
for dir in \
  /home/hatch/agents/agent-122eaa39-3cc8-42c2-9b17-d262ad0ca47c \
  /home/hatch/agents/agent-6fe635de-bfd4-488a-9090-51ae3209283a \
  /home/hatch/agents/agent-415ed051-0994-4301-a8c2-a8475c664174 \
  /home/hatch/agents/agent-357682ef-5ea3-4201-9de8-c317a9aa0150 \
  /home/hatch/agents/agent-00b9bdec-747a-49e5-97c9-4685aedd3edb; do
  session_id=$(basename "$dir" | sed 's/agent-//')
  jsonl="$dir/sessions/${session_id}.jsonl"
  if [ -f "$jsonl" ]; then
    cp "$jsonl" .agent/journal/
    echo "Copied: ${session_id}.jsonl ($(wc -l < "$jsonl") lines)"
  fi
done

ls -la .agent/journal/"}
